title: Position Embedding Computation
description: System computes positional encodings for multiview video tokens using RoPE, SinCos, and axis-based strategies
class_hierarchy: VideoPositionEmb → SinCosPosEmb_FPS_Aware (FPS-aware sincos, training module only)
VideoPositionEmb → SinCosPosEmbAxis (axis-separated sincos fixed, training module only)
VideoPositionEmb → LearnableEmb3D_FPS_Aware (FPS-aware learnable, training module only)
key_methods: VideoPositionEmb.forward(x_B_T_H_W_C, fps) → embeddings  [delegates to generate_embeddings, handles CP split]
MultiviewSinCosPosEmbAxis.generate_embeddings(B_T_H_W_C, fps) → (B, V*T, H, W, C) tensor
get_3d_sincos_pos_embed(embed_dim, grid_h, grid_w, grid_t, spatial_scale, temporal_scale) → numpy array
use_case_actor_mapping: TransformerAttentionModule → Compute Single-View Video Position Embedding
TransformerAttentionModule → Compute Multiview Video Position Embedding
InferencePipeline → Extrapolate Beyond Training Dimensions (NTK scaling)
use_case_inclusions: Compute Single-View Video Position Embedding <<include>> Enable Context Parallel Splitting
Compute Multiview Video Position Embedding <<include>> Generate Per-View Embeddings (n_views loop)
Compute Multiview Video Position Embedding <<include>> Enable Context Parallel Splitting
Apply 3D RoPE Encoding <<include>> Extrapolate Beyond Training Dimensions (NTK scaling)
Apply SinCos Axis-Based Encoding <<include>> Compute Single-View Video Position Embedding
Apply FPS-Aware Temporal Encoding <<extend>> Compute Single-View Video Position Embedding

VideoRopePosition3DEmb.head_dim: attention head dimension (split: dim_h=dim//6*2, dim_w=dim_h, dim_t=dim-2*dim_h)

MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb.n_views: default 4, camera views merged in T dimension

MultiviewSinCosPosEmbAxis.model_channels: channel dim split: dim_h=dim//6*2, dim_w=dim_h, dim_t=dim-2*dim_h

SinCosPosEmbAxis.buffers: pos_emb_h (len_h, dim_h), pos_emb_w (len_w, dim_w), pos_emb_t (len_t, dim_t)

LearnablePosEmbAxis.params: pos_emb_h, pos_emb_w, pos_emb_t as nn.Parameter, trunc_normal_(std=0.02)

cp_parallel_logic.single_view: seq_dim=0 for RoPE3D, seq_dim=1 for others; T scaled up by cp_size before generation, then split back
cp_parallel_logic.multiview_rope: rearrange (V*T, H, W, D) → V*(T*H*W,1,1,D), split on seq_dim=1 per view, rearrange back
cp_parallel_logic.multiview_sincos: rearrange B*(V*T, H, W, C) → (B*V)*(T, H, W, C), split seq_dim=1, rearrange back

important_notes: training/module has extra classes: SinCosPosEmb (3D full sincos with crop/resize/crop_resize), SinCosPosEmb_FPS_Aware, LearnableEmb3D, LearnableEmb3D_FPS_Aware, VideoRopePositionEmb (1D flat). Both modules share identical MultiviewVideoPositionEmb, MultiviewVideoRopePosition3DEmb, MultiviewSinCosPosEmbAxis implementations. Multiview classes use separate nn.Module base (not VideoPositionEmb). NTK extrapolation modifies theta base (10000 * ntk_factor) to handle out-of-distribution positions.
